allow: PowerShell(Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'c:\\Users\\zaidh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\ShotBoard'; npm run dev } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { "HTTP " + \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev-out.log -RedirectStandardError dev-err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content dev-out.log -Tail 15; "----ERR----"; Get-Content dev-err.log -Tail 15; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force 2>$null; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev' -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev.log -RedirectStandardError dev.err -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content dev.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "----ERR----"; Get-Content dev.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Remove-Item dev.log,dev.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "stopped 5174 pid " + $c.OwningProcess } else { "no listener on 5174" }; Remove-Item "c:\\Users\\zaidh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\ShotBoard\\dev.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('gsap' in deps, deps.get\('gsap','NOT FOUND'\)\)")
